{{Quote|This I've got to see.|Crislyn|<ref name="Kella Rand, Reporting...">{{JournalCite|6|Kella Rand, Reporting...}}</ref>}}
'''Crislyn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] reporter who worked for the [[Galactic News Network]] at the [[Indu GNN bureau]] on [[Indu San/Legends|Indu San]]. She was present at the bureau when [[Kella Rand]] discovered proof in her [[Holocamera/Legends|holocam]] recordings of [[Council Authority]] [[Authority Officer|officer]] [[Kaleb Darme]] planting a bomb in the midst of the [[Indu Council]].<ref name="Kella Rand, Reporting..." />

==Behind the scenes==
Cryslin was created by [[Laurie Burns]] for the [[1995]] short story "[[Kella Rand, Reporting...]]" In it, she had only one line of dialogue.<ref name="Kella Rand, Reporting..." />

==Appearances==
